English:
If your guild owns a guild house, every other Saturday, your guild will need to place an Artifact, which costs #b#u%s penyas#nu#nb, at a selected position from a defined list. 

If your guild doesn't have a guild house, you can register for the next artifact battle for #b#u%s penyas#nu#nb and have a chance to obtain a guild house!
You can only apply/cancel an hour before the battle start.


Once placed, your guild will be required to defend it on the PK channel from other players, or you will lose ownership of the house. 

If you successfully defend it, you will receive #bspecial rewards and a percentage of the fee#nb will be refunded.
Italian:
If your guild owns a guild house, every other Saturday, your guild will need to place an Artifact, which costs #b#u%s penyas#nu#nb, at a selected position from a defined list.

You can only apply/cancel an hour before the battle start.


Once placed, your guild will be required to defend it on the PK channel from other players, or you will lose ownership of the house. 

If you successfully defend it, you will receive #bspecial rewards and a percentage of the fee#nb will be refunded.
